# Copilot Instructions for agendamentoDeSalas

This is a Node.js project for room scheduling (agendamento de salas).

## Architecture Overview
- **Technology Stack**: Node.js with ES modules
- **Main Entry**: `index.js` (configured in package.json)
- **Source Directory**: `src/` (currently empty)
- **Test Directory**: `test/` (currently empty)

## Developer Workflows
- **Install Dependencies**: `npm install`
- **Run Tests**: `npm test` (placeholder script)
- **Build/Run**: No build script yet; run with `node index.js`

## Project Conventions
- Use ES modules (`import`/`export`) as specified in package.json
- Repository: https://github.com/rsortica/agendamentoDeSalas
- Project name: agendamentodesalas

## Key Files
- [package.json](package.json): Project configuration
- No source files yet - start by creating `src/index.js`

## Integration Points
- No external dependencies or integrations configured yet
- Git repository initialized

This project is in early stages. Focus on building the core room scheduling functionality.
